ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently affiliated with */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player named MVP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_mvp_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("mvp_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_seasons" (
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started in the season */,
  "qb_record" TEXT /* Quarterback record (wins-losses-ties) */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts */,
  "yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Yards per pass attempt (Y/A+) */,
  "net_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Net yards per pass attempt (NY/A+) */,
  "adjusted_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Adjusted yards per pass attempt (AY/A+) */,
  "adjusted_net_yards_per_attempt" REAL /* Adjusted net yards per pass attempt (ANY/A+) */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Completion percentage (Cmp%+) */,
  "touchdown_percentage" REAL /* Touchdown percentage (TD%+) */,
  "interception_percentage" REAL /* Interception percentage (Int%+) */,
  "sack_percentage" REAL /* Sack percentage (Sack%+) */,
  "passer_rating" REAL /* Passer rating (Rate+) */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the game */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started in the game */,
  "pass_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of pass attempts */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of completions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of passing touchdowns */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "sack_yards" INTEGER /* Total sack yards */,
  "rating" REAL /* Passer rating */,
  "rush_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" INTEGER /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
